ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 WordNet 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 WordNet 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the slash command for WordNet.
ast.target: 为 WordNet 启用斜杠命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The characters that will invoke the slash command. The command character cannot be a space.
ast.target: 用于调用斜杠命令的字符。命令字符不能是空格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The template used for inserting a WordNet definition. Use {term} for the term looked up and {definition} for the defintion of that term.
ast.target: 用于插入 WordNet 定义的模板。使用 {term} 表示查询的术语，使用 {definition} 表示该术语的定义。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: type word to lookup in WordNet
ast.target: 输入要在 WordNet 中查询的单词

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You do not have an internet connection, and the WordNet dictionary cannot be downloaded. Please restore your interent connection and resteart Obsidian
ast.target: 您没有互联网连接，WordNet 词典无法下载。请恢复您的互联网连接并重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: WordNet dictionary is being downloaded, this may take a few minutes. This message will disappear when the process is complete.
ast.target: WordNet 词典正在下载中，这可能需要几分钟时间。此消息将在下载完成后消失。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The WordNet dictionary file is not currently available for download. Please try again later or contact the developer on Twitter: @TfThacker for support.
ast.target: WordNet 词典文件目前无法下载。请稍后重试或通过 Twitter 联系开发者 @TfThacker 寻求支持。
